content: (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Anklets) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Bracelets) (Lydia unequipped Pharaoh's General Bra) (Frea picked up/took Silver Ring) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Body) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Hands) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Necklace) (Frea equipped Silver Ring) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Feet) (Frea equipped Dawnbreaker) (Frea unequipped Silver Witch Body) (Frea unequipped Silver Ring) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Tiara) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Skirt A) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Harness) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Armlets) (Lydia equipped Silver Ring) (Frea dropped/gave Silver Ring) (Lydia equipped Ebony Greatsword) (Lydia picked up/took Silver Ring) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Pasties) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Anklets) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Bra) (Lydia equipped Hide Boots) (Lydia equipped Pharaoh's General Stockings) (Lydia unequipped Silver Ring) (Lydia dropped/gave Silver Ring) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Betty Netch, Netch Calf, Netch Calf, Ash Hopper, Bull Netch) (MJR picked up / took Dragon Priest Dagger) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Tiara) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Skirt A) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Armlets) (Serana unequipped Pharaoh's General Bra) (Frea unequipped Dawnbreaker) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Bra) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Stockings) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Pasties) (Serana equipped Hide Boots) (Serana equipped Pharaoh's General Bracelets) (The location is now Skyrim.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Frea, Slaughterfish, Slaughterfish, Slaughterfish)

Imperial Soldier: Aye, this clear sky's a blessin' after that barrow's gloom—feels like Dibella herself is watchin' over us at dawn. But those slaughterfish in the water nearby... we best keep our wits sharp, Lydia. What's our next move with the Thane now we've got this dagger? Lydia: My Thane's safety comes first, soldier—I'll cleave any fish that dares swim too close with my greatsword. This Pharaoh's gear clings fierce, like Dibella's embrace, but I miss my proper chainmail for real battle. Stormcloaks would spit on these frills, but for MJR, I'll bear it. Serana, stay back;

(*You are observing the following:* The scene depicts a vast, rugged outdoor landscape viewed from a first-person perspective, suggesting immersion in a natural wilderness. In the foreground, the ground consists of uneven, rocky terrain with patches of reddish-brown dirt and sparse vegetation, including scattered bushes and low grasses. A calm body of water, possibly a lake or river, stretches across the middle ground, its surface reflecting the warm hues of the setting sun, with gentle ripples and a slight mist rising from it. Surrounding the water are clusters of evergreen trees, their needle-like branches dusted with snow in places, standing on gently sloping hills. In the background, a dramatic range of mountains rises sharply against a pale blue sky tinged with twilight oranges and purples, some peaks capped with white snow and emitting faint wisps of vapor or steam, creating an ethereal, foggy atmosphere. The overall lighting suggests late afternoon or early evening, casting long shadows and a golden glow over the scene. Overlaid on this vista are several semi-transparent interface elements: a prominent central notification reading "LEVEL UP" in bold white text, accompanied by a compass-like icon with directional markers.)
